title: Applying the 2025 FCERM funding policy: new project opportunity guidance and resources
text:
The following pages and documents describe the data and information required to determine if a project:

is eligible for FCERM funding

should be put forward for the FCERM investment programme

Each link provides you with more detailed guidance to help you:

Flood and coastal erosion risk management funding policy guidance

Capital grant eligible investment

Standalone NFM project interventions eligible for FCERM funding

Defining which areas and properties benefit from FCERM investment

Natural flood management benefit method

Natural flood management heat maps

Methods for calculating economic benefits
description: Guidance and resources to help apply the 2025 flood and coastal erosion risk management (FCERM) funding policy for new projects opportunities.
